title: Fix reference to deprecated types.Info
body:
upstream docker folks deprecated types.Info in favor of system.Info.

fixes #22132 and #22117

<!--

In case you're only changing docs, make sure to prefix the pull-request title with "[CI:DOCS]". That will prevent functional tests from running and save time and energy.

Finally, be sure to sign commits with your real name. Since by opening
a PR you already have commits, you can add signatures if needed with
something like `git commit -s --amend`.
-->

comments.body: the test failure i think is legit ... will look tomorrow.

The test failure I see it:
```
AssertionError: 'Container' not found in blah blah
```
The PR, as I read it, removes 'Container'.

The string "Container" appears in  https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/5c39ddca5dc7ac026ba4eacfd271450e7d0c7008/test/apiv2/python/rest_api/test_v2_0_0_image.py#L48

> The test failure I see it:
> 
> ```
> AssertionError: 'Container' not found in blah blah
> ```
> 
> The PR, as I read it, removes 'Container'.
> 
> The string "Container" appears in
> 
> https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/5c39ddca5dc7ac026ba4eacfd271450e7d0c7008/test/apiv2/python/rest_api/test_v2_0_0_image.py#L48

It looks like the "new" Container field needed to be added to the ImageInspect type rather than the Info type.
should be ready now; I do not think we should backport this to 5.0.1.

LGTM but it's a wee bit more than I can slashlgtm

Hi @baude 

there is still entries of docker.Info as of 5.0.3 -- https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/v5.0.3/pkg/api/handlers/types.go#L77

Ah, I presume we should expect this to be landed in 5.1, not 5.0
